=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/globalTimersInEffect.ts(7,3): warning TS377073: This Effect code uses `setTimeout`, the corresponding timer API in this context is `Effect.sleep or Schedule` from Effect. effect(globalTimersInEffect)
/.src/globalTimersInEffect.ts(12,3): warning TS377073: This Effect code uses `setInterval`, the corresponding timer API in this context is `Schedule or Effect.repeat` from Effect. effect(globalTimersInEffect)
/.src/globalTimersInEffect.ts(18,3): warning TS377073: This Effect code uses `setTimeout`, the corresponding timer API in this context is `Effect.sleep or Schedule` from Effect. effect(globalTimersInEffect)


==== /.src/globalTimersInEffect.ts (3 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics globalTimersInEffect:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    // Should trigger - setTimeout inside Effect.gen
    export const setTimeoutInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      setTimeout(() => {}, 100)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377073: This Effect code uses `setTimeout`, the corresponding timer API in this context is `Effect.sleep or Schedule` from Effect. effect(globalTimersInEffect)
    })
    
    // Should trigger - setInterval inside Effect.gen
    export const setIntervalInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      setInterval(() => {}, 1000)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377073: This Effect code uses `setInterval`, the corresponding timer API in this context is `Schedule or Effect.repeat` from Effect. effect(globalTimersInEffect)
    })
    
    // Should trigger - aliased setTimeout
    export const aliasedTimeout = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const myTimeout = setTimeout
      myTimeout(() => {}, 100)
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377073: This Effect code uses `setTimeout`, the corresponding timer API in this context is `Effect.sleep or Schedule` from Effect. effect(globalTimersInEffect)
    })
    
    // Should NOT trigger - setTimeout at module level
    setTimeout(() => {}, 0)
    
    // Should NOT trigger - setTimeout in regular function
    const _regularFn = () => {
      setTimeout(() => {}, 100)
    }
    
    // Should NOT trigger - setTimeout inside nested arrow in generator
    export const nestedArrowInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const fn = () => setTimeout(() => {}, 100)
      return fn
    })
